title: The Upper Hand
writer: Auguste Le Breton, Denys de La Patellière, Alphonse Boudard
actors: Jean Gabin, Gert Fröbe, George Raft
plot: In Paris, a gold smuggler is at war with other local gangsters who want piece of the action. Then the mob shows up and makes things worse. Also, an undercover US Treasury Department agent is trying to infiltrate the smuggler's bus...
